Posted at: 8:11 AM

Rant incoming cause I swear. To god.

For a website that is ALL ABOUT READING, literally the point of the app is to READ, why does it seem so many people can NOT???

I feel like we should definitely be at a point where everyone (including people who don't make j.ai bots) should know that issues such as the bot speaking for you/nonsense responses/etc are not within the bot creator's control BUT people continously leave reviews about it

This is probably my BIGGEST j.ai pet peeve cause HOW do you not know by now when it is in almost every creator's caption or bio 😃??

I have a WHOLE. ASS. QNA. and still get reviews about this. WHAT DO YOU WANT CREATORS TO DO?? We have like 5% control over the AI 🤦‍♀️

I need to know what goes through these people's heads, what do you think I can do to help the situation that I haven't already done 😵‍💫

Rant over 😛

moving on,

Lord I've been so busy this week 😩

But today I'm doing something a lil fun so I'm excitedddd 😛

Also yes, Dazai two days in a row (finally did one of my wips), maybe I'm obsessed...

anyways

Enjoy!

Love,

Mama Down
